v.text: need to get a taste of your fear,
need a little taste of your blood!
then we can finally be one.
you're everything that i've ever wanted...
just a single bite and im through,
there's no need to beg or bargain!
so give me One Last Bite!
'cause all that i need is you.
it's the way that this is ought to be,
you know that i love you...
but did you ever love me...?
